items.title: “The Beauty'”s Anthony Ramos Recalls Filming 'Crazy Scene' While 'Butt-Ass Naked' in Front of Ashton Kutcher (Exclusive)

items.title: Andy Reid Addresses Travis Kelce's Retirement Plans as Chiefs Offseason Is Underway
items.description: The tight end, whose contract with the Kansas City Chiefs ends in March 2026, is contemplating retirement after his 13-year career in the league

items.title: Alexandra Daddario and Andrew Form Split After 3 Years of Marriage, Will 'Continue to Co-Parent' (Exclusive)
items.description: The couple got married in June 2022 and welcomed their first baby in October 2024

items.title: Jennifer Garner Says Boxing Was Key to “The Last Thing He Told Me” Season 2 Prep (Exclusive)
items.description: "I knew Hannah had prepared to fight," Garner tells PEOPLE of her character

items.title: Hilary Duff Breaks Silence on Ashley Tisdale's Toxic Mom Group Essay, Says It's 'Not New for Me'
items.description: On Jan. 1, Ashley Tisdale French penned an essay about her "toxic mom group," which is allegedly about Duff and her friends
